summary: P1 Feature Testing: Enhanced Stripe Connect UX, Floating 'Become a Mentor' button, and Affiliate translation keys - ALL FEATURES WORKING

minor.issue: Returns 500 when Stripe platform not configured (expected behavior per test spec)

issues: The purple gradient may appear darker on some screens; contrast is adequate but could be brighter

critical_code_review_comments: data-testid attributes on floating buttons may not render properly on React Native Web - consider using testID prop
Shadow styling deprecation warnings in console (use boxShadow instead of shadow*)
seed_data_creation: Modified admin@cryptonai.com to is_professional=false for testing Become Mentor button
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features fully tested. Test credentials: jcuradeau.7@gmail.com/Crypto2026! (pro+influencer), admin@cryptonai.com/Admin123! (non-pro, for Become Mentor button)

details: Dashboard loads with translated title 'Affiliate Dashboard'
Stats grid shows Clicks, Conversions, Rate (with proper labels)
Total earned, Pending, Paid out sections visible
Affiliate link and code displayed with Copy button
3 step-by-step instructions shown when not connected
Step 1: Click the button below
Step 2: Fill in your banking details on Stripe
Step 3: Come back here — your status will update automatically
Connect Stripe button with link icon visible
Secure hint text: 'Secure connection via Stripe. Your data is not stored on our servers.'
Overview tab visible
Conversions tab visible
Payouts tab visible
Purple floating button with school icon RENDERS for non-pro authenticated user (admin@cryptonai.com)
Button correctly positioned above VIP button when user is VIP
Button does NOT appear for PRO user (jcuradeau.7@gmail.com) - correct behavior
GET /api/influencer/stats returns 200 with correct fields
GET /api/influencer/stripe/status returns 200
POST /api/influencer/stripe/connect returns response (500 expected if Stripe not configured)
Login returns is_professional flag correctly
